title: oldenlandia corymbosa var. nana
intro: Oldenlandia corymbosa var. nana is a small, shrub-like herb belonging to the Rubiaceae family, commonly found in tropical Asia and used in traditional medicine. It is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Oldenlandia corymbosa var. nana include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and acting as an antihelmintic agent to expel intestinal worms. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
